_documentation: BBF Day 0 Welcome Email Templates — Trilingual
_usage: Import into Brevo as transactional email templates. Use {{params.FIRSTNAME}}, {{params.TIER}}, {{params.USERNAME}}, and {{params.PIN}} for personalization. PIN and USERNAME come from Render's /provision endpoint after Stripe payment success. The PIN is plaintext — do not log to analytics, do not forward to third parties.

subject.en: Welcome to Build Believe Fit, {{FIRSTNAME}} — Your Blueprint Is Ready
subject.es: Bienvenido a Build Believe Fit, {{FIRSTNAME}} — Tu Plan Está Listo
subject.pt: Bem-vindo à Build Believe Fit, {{FIRSTNAME}} — Seu Plano Está Pronto

body.en:
{{FIRSTNAME}},

Your Community Blueprint is confirmed. You just made a decision that separates you from 95% of people who talk about change but never invest in it.

Your access credentials (save these — you'll need them every time you sign in):
✓ Username: {{params.USERNAME}}
✓ PIN: {{params.PIN}}

Here is what you now have access to:

✓ The full self-guided Habit Architecture system
✓ Your TDEE calculator and macro blueprint
✓ BBF Client App — workout tracking, progress charts, offline sync
✓ Community Resource video modules (Modules 1-2)
✓ OT-informed joint health guide (PDF)

Your Day 1 action:
Open the BBF App → Sign in with the credentials above → Log your first session → Build the streak.

🔗 Open Your App: https://buildbelievefit.fitness/bbf-app.html

The system works when you show up. Show up.

— Akeem Brown
Owner, Build Believe Fit LLC
NASM-CPT | Exercise Science | Future OT
Direct: 623-340-9254
body.es:
{{FIRSTNAME}},

Tu Plan Comunitario está confirmado. Acabas de tomar una decisión que te separa del 95% de personas que hablan de cambiar pero nunca invierten en ello.

Tus credenciales de acceso (guárdalas — las necesitarás cada vez que inicies sesión):
✓ Usuario: {{params.USERNAME}}
✓ PIN: {{params.PIN}}

Ahora tienes acceso a:

✓ El sistema completo de Arquitectura de Hábitos autoguiado
✓ Tu calculadora TDEE y plan de macros
✓ App BBF — seguimiento de entrenamientos, gráficos de progreso, sincronización offline
✓ Módulos de video comunitarios (Módulos 1-2)
✓ Guía de salud articular informada por TO (PDF)

Tu acción del Día 1:
Abre la App BBF → Inicia sesión con las credenciales arriba → Registra tu primera sesión → Construye la racha.

🔗 Abre Tu App: https://buildbelievefit.fitness/bbf-app.html

El sistema funciona cuando te presentas. Preséntate.

— Akeem Brown
Propietario, Build Believe Fit LLC
NASM-CPT | Ciencias del Ejercicio | Futuro TO
Directo: 623-340-9254

subject.en: {{FIRSTNAME}}, You're Elite Now — Your 8-Week Challenge Starts Today
subject.es: {{FIRSTNAME}}, Ahora Eres Elite — Tu Desafío de 8 Semanas Comienza Hoy
subject.pt: {{FIRSTNAME}}, Agora Você É Elite — Seu Desafio de 8 Semanas Começa Hoje

body.en:
{{FIRSTNAME}},

Your Elite 8-Week Challenge enrollment is confirmed. This is not a course. This is 56 days of engineered transformation — the same system I used to reach 175 lbs of clean muscle mass.

Your access credentials (save these — you'll need them every time you sign in):
✓ Username: {{params.USERNAME}}
✓ PIN: {{params.PIN}}

Your Elite arsenal:

✓ Everything in Community Blueprint
✓ Custom 7-day meal plan built for YOUR body and schedule
✓ Full BBF App — all features unlocked, progressive overload tracking
✓ Bi-weekly group coaching sessions
✓ Masterclass Vault — all 6 modules (Human Performance Foundation, Progressive Overload, Nutrition, Joint Longevity, Sleep Architecture, Transformation Blueprint)
✓ Trilingual support (EN / ES / PT)

Your Day 1 protocol:
1. Open the BBF App and sign in with the credentials above
2. Review your custom meal plan and workout protocol — both are loaded and waiting
3. Log your starting weight and complete your first session

🔗 Open Your App: https://buildbelievefit.fitness/bbf-app.html

The 8 weeks start now. Direct line below for any questions.

— Akeem Brown
Owner, Build Believe Fit LLC
NASM-CPT | Exercise Science | Future OT
Direct: 623-340-9254
body.es:
{{FIRSTNAME}},

✓ PIN: {{params.PIN}}

Tu arsenal Elite:

✓ Plan alimenticio personalizado de 7 días para TU cuerpo y horario
✓ App BBF completa — todas las funciones desbloqueadas, seguimiento de sobrecarga progresiva
✓ Sesiones de coaching grupal quincenales
✓ Vault Masterclass — los 6 módulos (Fundación de Rendimiento Humano, Sobrecarga Progresiva, Nutrición, Longevidad Articular, Arquitectura del Sueño, Plan de Transformación)

Tu protocolo del Día 1:

3. Registra tu peso inicial y completa tu primera sesión

🔗 Abre Tu App: https://buildbelievefit.fitness/bbf-app.html

Las 8 semanas comienzan ahora. Línea directa abajo para cualquier pregunta.

— Akeem Brown

NASM-CPT | Ciencias del Ejercicio | Futuro TO

subject.en: {{FIRSTNAME}}, Welcome to Legacy — Your Bespoke Protocol Begins
subject.es: {{FIRSTNAME}}, Bienvenido a Legacy — Tu Protocolo a Medida Comienza
subject.pt: {{FIRSTNAME}}, Bem-vindo ao Legacy — Seu Protocolo Sob Medida Começa

body.en:
{{FIRSTNAME}},

Your Legacy Performance Protocol enrollment is confirmed. You have invested at the highest level — and the system is configured to deliver a return that exceeds every dollar.

Your access credentials (save these — you'll need them every time you sign in):
✓ Username: {{params.USERNAME}}
✓ PIN: {{params.PIN}}

Your Legacy experience:

✓ Everything in the Elite Challenge
✓ Fully bespoke weekly program design — rebuilt every 7 days around YOUR feedback
✓ OT-clinical movement and longevity assessment
✓ Executive travel and schedule adaptation — your program flexes with your life
✓ Priority direct access via text or email
✓ Multi-language sessions available (EN / ES / PT)

Your Day 1 protocol:
1. Open the BBF App and sign in with the credentials above — Legacy access is configured
2. Review your bespoke workout and meal blueprints — both are loaded and waiting
3. Log your starting baseline; the program rebuilds around your feedback weekly

🔗 Open Your App: https://buildbelievefit.fitness/bbf-app.html

You are not just a client. You are building a legacy. Direct line below for any questions.

— Akeem Brown
Owner, Build Believe Fit LLC
NASM-CPT | Exercise Science | Future OT
Direct: 623-340-9254
body.es:

✓ Acceso directo prioritario por texto o email

2. Revisa tus planos a medida de entrenamiento y alimentación — ambos están cargados y esperando
3. Registra tu línea base inicial; el programa se reconstruye semanalmente según tu feedback

🔗 Abre Tu App: https://buildbelievefit.fitness/bbf-app.html

No eres solo un cliente. Estás construyendo un legado. Línea directa abajo para cualquier pregunta.

— Akeem Brown
